caption: Day one of the summer field season off the North Frisian coast. The survey grid is set and the first dive team is in the water. Follow along all season! ⚓ #maritimearchaeology #northsea #wattenmeer
First major find of the season: a section of clinker-built hull, likely a 15th-century Hanseatic cog. Dendro samples on the way to the lab. More soon. #hanseatic #shipwreck #unterwasserarchäologie
PhD student Anja documenting timber in situ on the seabed. Patient, careful recording is how a wreck gives up its story. Great work from the dive team today. #maritimearchaeology #northsea
Save the date: our Community Open Day at the harbour returns next month. Recovered finds, the conservation table, and the chance to meet the survey team. Details to follow! #heritage #wattenmeer
